name: web3-basics

scripts.frontend:kill: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }"
scripts.frontend:restart: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; mvn spring-boot:run"

description: Escrow fashion store DApp prototype with a Java Spring Boot local API server, storefront, buyer center, and seller center.
